caption: The video features a man standing on a stage, addressing an audience with a microphone in front of him. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery and a red and white pendant. The man appears to be speaking or singing, as he holds a yellow object, possibly a piece of paper or a small book, in his hand. The background consists of wooden slats, giving the setting a warm and rustic feel. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems attentive, suggesting that the man is delivering an important message or performance. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, indicating the possible affiliation or sponsorship of the event.
